entry.title: New: Reso 25-210 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"APPOINTING AN INDIVIDUAL TO FILL THE VACANCY FOR THE KAHULUI RESIDENCY AREA FOR THE REMAINDER OF THE 2025-2027 TERM" The purpose of this resolution is to submit the name of Virgilio "Leo" R. Agcolicol to fill the vacancy for the Kahului Residency Area.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
